calendar.matters:
Status Of Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Off Calendar

Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment (Minor)
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Noelle T. Nguyen, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Eiko Bokura, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Amanda Bokura present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $7,860.00
Reimbursement for Medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the total amount of $150.00.
Medical expenses to be paid to Accent Lien $3,802.00
A net balance of $3,952.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at San Francisco Fire Credit Union located at 3201 California Street, San Francisco CA 94118 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on February 21, 2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
